query:
SELECT 
  js.id, js.email, js.step, js.userId,
  js.joiningFeePaidAt, js.mandateId, js.paymentIntentId,
  js.createdAt, js.updatedAt
FROM join_sessions js
WHERE js.email = 'astmeridian@outlook.com'
ORDER BY js.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;
